notes: Each PNG asset is cropped from the supplied image and exported with transparency where practical.
All bbox coordinates refer to the original 1672x941 image.
The inpainted background is provided as a convenience layer for a game prototype; keep the original source for reference.
Rocks are exported as approximate ellipse-cut individual sprites because the watercolor stones overlap.

assets.notes: One-piece dock/boardwalk layer. Contains original plank texture.
Whole visible rock field as a single layer/collision region.
Right dirt/gravel shore strip beside the dock.
Primary water playfield layer; use as broad playable water zone.
Top-down person standing on dock, with small shadow.
